3219420.name: Ticking Rooms EP1: 20 Minute
3219420.description:
“20 Minutes” is an episodic horror experience that blends psychological tension with puzzle elements. Players race against time in the dark rooms of a hotel, uncovering not only the secrets of the place but also of their own mind.

Objects that seem simple at first glance are actually fragments of the story, and when used correctly, they reveal the hidden truth behind mysterious events.

“20 Minutes” is not just a horror game; it is an exploration of time, memory, and perception. As players confront the consequences of their choices, they are left with one haunting question: How much are you willing to sacrifice to see the truth?
3219420.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 简体中文, 繁体中文, 俄语, 土耳其语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
